cases.name: missing text and blocks is rejected
cases.expectError: Source normalization input must include text or blocks.

cases.name: empty text is rejected
cases.expectError: Source normalization requires non-empty text or at least one block.

cases.name: empty blocks are rejected
cases.expectError: Source normalization requires non-empty text or at least one block.

cases.name: block with empty text is rejected
cases.expectError: Source block at index 0 has empty text after trimming.
